name: Disney Princesses
description: The Disney animated princesses from Snow White to Raya — characters, films, and songs

questions.q: What is the name of Ariel's best friend, a small yellow-and-blue fish in The Little Mermaid?

source.notes: Sebastian is the crab; Scuttle is the seagull.

questions.q: Who is Ariel's father, king of the sea in The Little Mermaid?

source.notes: Ruler of Atlantica; voiced by Kenneth Mars in the 1989 film.

questions.q: Which Disney character sings 'Let It Go' in the 2013 film Frozen?

source.notes: Won the Oscar for Best Original Song; performed by Idina Menzel.

questions.q: In which Disney film is the showstopping duet 'A Whole New World' performed on a magic carpet?

source.notes: Won the 1992 Oscar for Best Original Song.

questions.q: What is the name of Rapunzel's color-changing chameleon companion in Tangled?

source.notes: Tangled released in 2010.

questions.q: Which Disney princess disguises herself as a male soldier to take her father's place in the army?

source.notes: Adopts the male name Ping.

questions.q: What alias does Princess Aurora use while living in the forest with three fairies in Sleeping Beauty?

source.notes: Raised as a peasant girl to hide her from Maleficent's curse.

questions.q: In what year was Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs — Disney's first feature-length animated film — released?

source.notes: First feature-length cel-animated film in history.

questions.q: What is the name of Cinderella's scheming stepmother?

source.notes: Mother of Anastasia and Drizella, the wicked stepsisters.

questions.q: Which 2009 Disney film stars Tiana, an aspiring restaurateur from New Orleans?

source.notes: Disney's return to hand-drawn animation after a five-year hiatus.

questions.q: Merida, the Scottish archer princess, stars in which 2012 Pixar film?

source.notes: Pixar's first fairy-tale film; won Best Animated Feature.

questions.q: What is the name of the kingdom ruled by Elsa and Anna in Frozen?

source.notes: Inspired by Norway, including Nidaros Cathedral and Akershus Fortress.

questions.q: Which three good fairies watch over Princess Aurora in Sleeping Beauty?

source.notes: Color-coded red, green, and blue; Merryweather softens the curse of death to sleep.

questions.q: What is the name of Mulan's small comic-relief dragon sidekick?

source.notes: Voiced by Eddie Murphy; a demoted family guardian.

questions.q: What is the name of Jasmine's pet Bengal tiger in Aladdin?

source.notes: Fiercely protective of Jasmine; set on Jafar in Hyena form.

questions.q: In Moana, what is the name of the demigod (voiced by Dwayne Johnson) who helps her on her voyage?

source.notes: Demigod of the wind and sea; shape-shifter via magical fishhook.

questions.q: Which Cajun firefly helps Tiana and Naveen through the bayou in The Princess and the Frog?

source.notes: Louis is the trumpet-playing alligator.

questions.q: What is the real name of Rapunzel's charming love interest in Tangled, who goes by the alias Flynn Rider?

source.notes: An orphan; Flynn Rider is a stage name borrowed from a novel character.

questions.q: The 2021 film Raya and the Last Dragon is set in a fictional land inspired by which region?

source.notes: Kumandra draws from Thai, Lao, Vietnamese, Indonesian, and Filipino cultures.

questions.q: Tiana holds the distinction of being which Disney milestone?
choices: Disney's first princess without a love interest

source.notes: The Princess and the Frog (2009); voiced by Anika Noni Rose.

questions.q: What is the name of Pocahontas's mischievous raccoon companion?

source.notes: Flit is the hummingbird; Percy is Governor Ratcliffe's pug.

questions.q: Who leads the Hun army as the menacing villain of Mulan?

source.notes: Voiced by Miguel Ferrer; ruthless warlord seeking to conquer China.
